changes.description: Merged duplicate cancelSubscription methods (was at lines 490 and 731). Unified into single method supporting both immediate and period-end cancellation with Stripe API integration.

Moved Stripe webhook route registration BEFORE express.json() body parser. Stripe signature verification requires raw (unparsed) request body — the previous ordering would have broken signature verification in non-Vercel environments.

verification.build: PASS — pnpm build succeeds with no errors
verification.duplicateMethod: FIXED — only one cancelSubscription method exists now
verification.webhookRouteOrder: FIXED — stripe webhook registered before body parsers

webhookEndpoint.rawBodyParsing: FIXED — route now registered before express.json()

subscriptionCreationFlow.checkoutSession: Creates Stripe Checkout Session via subscription.router createCheckoutSession

creditAllocation.checkoutCompleted: Handles credit package purchases (metadata.packageId) and subscription checkout (metadata.subscriptionTierSlug)
creditAllocation.invoicePaid: Resets usage counters for new billing period, updates period dates from Stripe invoice
creditAllocation.creditsPerTier: Determined by tier.monthlyExecutionLimit — no hardcoded values

creditDeduction.executionCheck: subscriptionService.canExecuteTask() checks status, period, and remaining executions
creditDeduction.costTracking: costTracking.service.ts tracks per-API-call costs with daily summaries and budget alerts

subscriptionManagement.upgrade: OK — updateTier updates local tier + Stripe metadata
subscriptionManagement.cancellation: FIXED — unified cancelSubscription supports immediate + period-end + Stripe API
subscriptionManagement.resume: OK — subscription.router resume endpoint undoes cancel_at_period_end
subscriptionManagement.billingPortal: OK — getBillingPortalUrl creates Stripe Billing Portal session
